texto: Anywhere - and, it follows, nowhere - can be a place. As long as we are there, to think and talk, to listen and respond. The world, once conscious of itself in the form of human making, is a vast concert hall. What sounds there is not the divine music of celestial spheres, as the ancient Greek mathematicians believed, but the sound of one human after another issuing the daily plea: to be heard, to be understood, to be accommodated.
explicacao: Citação de Mark Kingwell sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Anywhere - and, it follows, nowhere - can be a place. As long as we are there, to think and talk,…” articula reflexao, being, consciousness em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como consciousness e mind.
